title: F3 Team Challenges: remove confetti, pyramid-collapse framing, tier comparisons
queue_body:
## Goal
Before F3 Team Challenges can enter design specs, revise to
remove all shipgate violations:
(a) No confetti / haptics / victory audio on challenge end
(b) No "collapse / lava / meltdown / running out" language
(c) No Bronze/Silver/Gold or any tier labeling across teams
(d) Celebrate only the completion itself; single frame, no
    animation beyond fade-in; brief affirmation text
Add explicit shipgate lint entries for banned phrases in
any team-challenge namespace. Alternative structure: simple
cooperative shared-progress bar toward a fixed numerical goal.

- docs/engineering/shipgate.md
- scripts/shipgate/banned.json
## Definition of Done
- ADR accepted
- Shipgate policy doc updated with explicit confetti ban
- F3 spec revised
## Reporting
complete via: node .agentdb/kimi-queue.js complete <id> --worker human-architect --result "<branch>"
